text: Use pronumerals to represent numbers and substitute values into algebraic expressions.
Simplify algebraic expressions by collecting like terms.
Expand and factorise simple algebraic expressions.
Apply the index laws to simplify expressions with integer indices.
Apply index laws involving negative and fractional indices.
Find the gradient and midpoint of an interval on the number plane.
Determine and graph the equation of a straight line.
Describe the gradient of a tangent as a limiting process and as a rate of change.
Differentiate power functions and polynomials using the power rule.
Find the equation of a tangent to a curve at a given point.
